overall.description: Atmospheric third-person gameplay footage of an armored character traversing a rocky cliff edge during a stormy night. The character walks along the precipice overlooking a vast, foggy ocean with low visibility and moody blue-grey lighting.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow rocky cliff ledge above dark ocean

agents.ego_description: armored character with large weapon and shield on back walking carefully along the cliff edge

entered.detail: steep jagged rock face rising immediately beside the path
vast expanse of dark water shrouded in thick mist and fog
dark heavy overcast sky covering the entire horizon

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with a third-person view of an armored character walking along a narrow rocky cliff ledge. A steep rock wall rises on the left while a vast, fog-shrouded ocean drops away to the right. The atmosphere is dark and moody with storm clouds overhead and low visibility.

scene_state.functional_zone: open cliff precipice above foggy abyss

events.description: character moves past the cliff wall onto an open precipice with unobstructed view of the foggy ocean
character slows to a complete stop at the cliff edge, standing still to observe the view

agents.ego_description: character continues walking along the path before slowing to a halt at the edge, standing still and gazing out into the foggy darkness

segments.scene_description: As the character moves forward, the cliff wall recedes behind them, opening up to a wide precipice with an unobstructed view of the foggy ocean. The character continues walking before slowing to a stop at the edge, standing still against the backdrop of the dark, misty expanse and stormy sky.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement along a precarious cliffside that transitions from a confined rocky corridor into a wide, exposed precipice. It begins with a third-person view of an armored character navigating a narrow ledge, flanked by a steep rock wall on the left and a fog-shrouded ocean on the right under a dark, stormy sky. As the character moves forward, the oppressive cliff wall gradually recedes, opening the environment into a vast, unobstructed vista of the misty sea. The scene then shifts as the character slows their pace, finally coming to a complete stop at the very edge of the cliff to stand still against the moody, blue-grey expanse of the storm.
